FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Momentum Above MA20 as Risk Tone Favors USD
tldr_points: Price above MA20 signals bullish continuation
Iran tensions limit JPY safe-haven flows
FX.excerpt: Bullish USD/JPY setup with price holding above MA20 amid mixed geopolitical risk and supportive Fed rhetoric.
FX.comment: Bullish USD/JPY setup with price holding above MA20 amid mixed geopolitical risk and supportive Fed rhetoric.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Trump’s Iran Deal Catalysts and Technical Support at MA20
tldr_points: Technical support at MA20 (7412.73) with price above key level
Iran Deal negotiations boosting macro sentiment
Healthcare sector caution may limit sector-specific risks
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 shows strength above MA20 amid Iran Deal optimism; buy with risk-sensitive approach.
STOCKS.comment: Technical support at MA20 combined with Iran Deal optimism supports upward bias.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Price sits below MA20, suggesting a dip-buying opportunity.
US policy news and infrastructure expansion bolster long-term BTC fundamentals.
Entry near 73.5k, target MA20 around 77.6k with stop below 72k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD poised for rebound to MA20 amid supportive US policy news and infrastructure gains, despite near-term technical pressure.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC/USD poised for rebound to MA20 amid supportive US policy news and infrastructure gains, despite near-term technical pressure.
